Class BookingController

java.lang.Object
com.team.hotelbooking.controllers.BookingController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/bookings") public class BookingController extends Object

  • Method Details

    • createBooking

      @PostMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<BookingResponseDTO> createBooking(@RequestBody BookingRequestDTO request)

    • cancelBooking

      @PutMapping("/{id}/cancel") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> cancelBooking(@PathVariable Long id)

    • getGuestBookings

      @GetMapping("/guest/{guestId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<BookingResponseDTO>> getGuestBookings(@PathVariable Long guestId)

    • getHostBookings

      @GetMapping("/host/{hostId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<BookingResponseDTO>> getHostBookings(@PathVariable Long hostId)

    • getUpcomingBookings

      @GetMapping("/upcoming") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<BookingResponseDTO>> getUpcomingBookings()

    • getAvailableRoomsByDate

      @GetMapping("/available/{startDate}/{endDate}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Long>> getAvailableRoomsByDate(@PathVariable LocalDate startDate, @PathVariable LocalDate endDate)
